title: Adding Time tracking Summaries together
excerpt: I have two time tracking summaries on my item line.  For some reason it wont add them together using the formula i would use for adding to normal time tracking columns together.  Can anyone help?

posts.author: JCross (John Cross)
posts.cookedHtml: I have two time tracking summaries on my item line. For some reason it wont add them together using the formula i would use for adding to normal time tracking columns together. Can anyone help?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you share a screenshot of what’s happening?

posts.author: JCross (John Cross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Thanks for getting in touch, i managed a figure out a workaround which actually works better for the board than my original set up.

Many thanks
